name: SC-DO - Shades (2025) (ES)
plot: Matices tells the story of a renowned and charismatic psychiatrist who gathers six of his patients together at a remote winery to complete their treatment with his famous method, which has achieved a very high cure rate among the most complex and difficult-to-manage patients. After an unusual ceremonial tasting, an unexpected turn of events occurs with a fateful ending. Following the arrival of an astute police inspector who takes over the case, the truth is uncovered about the doctor and his patients’ traumas.
cast: Elsa Pataky, Eusebio Poncela, Hovik Keuchkerian, Luis Tosar, Maxi Iglesias, Miriam Giovanelli, Enrique Arce, Juana Acosta
director: Sergio Cánovas, Javier Naya, Álex Meriweather

name: SC-DO - Starting 5 (2024) (US)
plot: This captivating sports series follows Jimmy Butler, Anthony Edwards, LeBron James, Domantas Sabonis and Jayson Tatum throughout the 2023-24 NBA season.
cast: Jimmy Butler, Anthony Edwards, LeBron James, Domantas Sabonis, Jayson Tatum

name: SC-DO - Court of Gold (2025) (US)
plot: Go behind the scenes with the top medal contenders in men's basketball as they battle for gold and glory at the 2024 Olympic Games in Paris.
cast: Stephen Curry, Kevin Durant, Victor Wembanyama, LeBron James, Steve Kerr, Barack Obama, Dwyane Wade, Shai Gilgeous-Alexander

name: SC-DO - The Last Dance (2020) (US)
plot: A 10-part documentary chronicling the untold story of Michael Jordan and the Chicago Bulls dynasty with rare, never-before-seen footage and sound from the 1997-98 championship season – plus over 100 interviews with famous figures and basketball’s biggest names.
cast: Michael Jordan, Scottie Pippen, Dennis Rodman, Steve Kerr, Phil Jackson

name: SC-DO - Too Much (2025) (GB)
plot: When a heartbroken New Yorker moves to London hoping for a love story, she falls for an indie musician who's anything but the typical romantic hero.
cast: Megan Stalter, Will Sharpe, Richard E. Grant, Stephen Fry, Janicza Bravo, Michael Zegen, Rhea Perlman, Rita Wilson
